The reason why a bear does not need a fishing pole to catch trout is because they use their bear hands.
When a bear is stuck out in the rain too long he is known as a drizzly bear.
The reason it is so cheap to feed a polar bear is because they live on ice only.
A bear will always stay for dessert because they love to eat blue beary pie.
The best way to apologize to a koala is to simply bear your heart and soul to them.
The koala got fired from his new job because he would only do the bear minimum.
A freezing bear is also known as a brrrrrrrrrrrrr.
When the little bear applied to work at the movie theater, he was told that he was not koala-fied.
The teddy bear did not want any cake after dinner because he said he was stuffed.
Bears do not wear socks because they have bear-feet.
The only animal that can hibernate while standing on its head is Yoga Bear.
Call a bear wearing earmuffs anything you want because they can not hear you.
The way that the little bear would stop the movie was to hit the paws button.
Igloos are made round so that polar bears can not hide in the corners and attack the Eskimos.
A polar bear found on thin ice is definitely an ice breaker.
The technical term for a grizzly bear at the North Pole is “lost”.
Black bears keep their caves nice and cool during hibernation by using the bear conditioner.
If you have a dream a bear is going to eat you, it might be considered a bite-mare.
When it comes to music, all polar bears love songs by Seal.
Every summer, the grizzly family goes on vacation in a bear-o-plane.
The difference between a panda and a polar bear is 1,000 miles.
The little bear cub was having trouble at school today because he was up late playing video games and today he was bearly awake.
A bear with a negative attitude is always the bearer of bad news.
A grizzly will eat only four kinds of pie, rasbeary, strawbeary, cranbeary, or blackbeary.
Unlike humans, bears do not need shoes when going out because they can go bear foot.
Some people love watching white bears get aroused, others hate it. It’s polar rising.
I accidentally played dad instead of dead when i encountered a bear Now it can ride a bicycle without training wheels.
The bear couldn’t decide whether to go north or south for the winter He was a bipolar bear.
Why aren’t koalas considered bears? They don’t meet the koalafications.
How do bears catch fish? They use their bear hands!.
Bitch better have my honey
Did you know you only need two letters to spell panda? You need a P and A.
What do you call a panda that lost his food? Bamboozled.
How can pandas get to a hospital quickly? In a bamboolance.
What is a bear's favourite drink? A Koka-Koala.
What does a baby bear have? A bear bum!
What is the only cheese a bear can smell? Camembear!
What do you call a bear that says he never wants to grow up? Peter Panda.
What time is it when 3 bears are chasing you? 3 after 1
How do you start a Teddy bear race? Teddy, Set, Go!
What do Teddy bears do when it rains? They get wet.
What do you do with a green Teddy bear? Wait until he’s ripe!

What kind of umbrella does a Teddy bear carry when it’s raining? A. A wet one!
